page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-90 is a general-purpose server instance powered by the x86_64 architecture. It features an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor with 45 physical cores and 90 vCPUs, utilizing simultaneous multithreading with 2.0 threads per core. The instance is configured with 360.0 GB of dedicated system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. It does not include local NVMe storage or bundled GPUs, and is provisioned with zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

In benchmark evaluations, the c3d-standard-90 demonstrates top-tier multi-core processing capabilities, placing in the top 10% for multi-core CPU performance, software compilation, and cryptographic operations. Single-core performance and memory read bandwidth are also strong, ranking in the top 25%. However, memory write bandwidth for large uncached blocks and single-threaded decompression tasks fall into the average tier. The system also exhibits strong performance in database operations and static web serving throughput.

Given its high resource density and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance offers high qualitative cost efficiency for highly parallelized workloads that do not require local SSD storage or GPU acceleration. It is well-suited for multi-threaded software compilation, database operations, static web serving, and medium-scale language model prompt processing.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-90 is a general-purpose server instance featuring 90 vCPUs and 360.0 GB of dedicated RAM. Powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor with 45 physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, this instance delivers 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs. In benchmark testing, the c3d-standard-90 achieves top-tier multi-core CPU performance, software compilation speeds, and cryptographic execution. It also demonstrates strong memory read bandwidth and database processing capabilities, though memory write speeds remain average. This hardware profile is optimized for highly parallelized workloads, including multi-threaded software compilation, database operations, static web serving, and medium-scale language model prompt processing.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-90 is a general-purpose server featuring 90 vCPUs, 360 GB RAM, and an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor, delivering top-tier multi-core performance for parallel workloads.

tagline: A high-density, 90-vCPU general-purpose instance delivering top-tier multi-core processing and strong memory read bandwidth for parallel enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor with 90 vCPUs and 45 physical cores
Equipped with 360 GB of dedicated RAM, providing 4.0 GB per core
Top-tier performance in multi-core CPU execution, software compilation, and cryptography
Strong memory read bandwidth and database operations throughput
Designed for parallel workloads, database hosting, and static web serving
